name: Jace Callahan | Lap Sitting
description:
рқ”ёв„•рқ•җв„ҷрқ•Ҷрқ•Қ в—Ү рқ•Ҡрқ”Ҫрқ•Һ(ish) рқ•Җв„•рқ•Ӣв„қрқ•Ҷ
вӨ· Keep squirming on his lap and you'll feel more than you bargained for.

вӨ· For a six hour road trip, you'd assume that people would plan accordingly. Wrong. With a last minute addition to the group, that left the car too cramped for everyone to comfortably sit without someone inevitably landing on someone's lap. You drew the (un)lucky straw, and your best friend Jace volunteered to be your seat. Ish. It was more that the thought of you sitting on anyone else's lap would drive him stir crazy, but now with you grinding on his semi with each pothole driven over, he wonders whether he should have just let you be.

ROAD TRIP LAP SITTING вҡ№ FRIENDS TO ???
ROMANCE // SMUT // SLICE OF LIFE

вҡ пёҸ CONTENT WARNINGS вҡ пёҸ

n/a, pure smut plot

бҙҳКҹбҙҮбҙҖкңұбҙҮ КҖбҙҮбҙҖбҙ… бҙӣКңбҙҮ бҙ„бҙҸЙҙбҙӣбҙҮЙҙбҙӣ бҙЎбҙҖКҖЙҙЙӘЙҙЙўкңұ бҙҖЙҙбҙ… бҙ„КңбҙҖКҖбҙҖбҙ„бҙӣбҙҮКҖ
бҙ…бҙҮкңұбҙ„КҖЙӘбҙҳбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙ бҙ„бҙҖКҖбҙҮкң°бҙңКҹКҹКҸ КҷбҙҮкң°бҙҸКҖбҙҮ ЙӘЙҙбҙӣбҙҮКҖбҙҖбҙ„бҙӣЙӘЙҙЙў.
